description: Inline modifier that controls fill opacity, from 0 (fully transparent) to 1 (fully opaque).
utility: Set fill transparency on shapes using inline modifier

alternates.description: Fill is completely invisible, only stroke shows
Completely solid fill with no transparency

alternates.syntax: polygon(G, A, B, C, fc(yellow), fo(0.3))
alternates.description: Semi-transparent yellow fill on a polygon
Animate fill opacity change on an existing shape

examples.scenario: Polygon with very light fill for linear programming
examples.expression: P = polygon(G, point(G, 0, 0), A, B, fo(0.1))

examples.scenario: Triangle with invisible fill and stroke
Rectangle with full opacity fill image

examples.expression: w = write(at(2,3), "Hello x^2", fc(orange), fo(0.5), pd(10))
